title: Angel Biscuits
instructions: Dissolve yeast in tepid water with 1 teaspoon of sugar.
Combine flour, 4 tbsp. sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
Cut in butter, then add buttermilk with yeast mixture.
Mix thoroughly, then knead a few minutes on a floured surface until smooth.
Put dough in a covered bowl and let stand 1 hour or until doubled in bulk.
Punch down dough and roll out about 1/2 inch thick.
Cut into biscuits with a floured 1 1/2 inch cookie cutter.
Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake at 400 degrees for 10-12 minutes or until light brown.
notes: Dough can be stored in a tightly covered container in the fridge for 2 weeks.
Dough doesn't have to rise quite a full hour before doubling in bulk.
For strawberry shortcake, brush biscuits with cream and top with sugar before baking.
